programme.sub-title: Crystal Bridges Museum of American Art Hour 1
programme.desc: A 1976 Marvel UK Super Spider-Man #175 cover art; a 1926 Rogers Hornsby sterling trophy; Winslow Homer watercolors circa 1879.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.sub-title: Crystal Bridges Museum of American Art Hour 2
programme.desc: An Elvis Presley-signed ice cream display; an Arnold Palmer-engraved golf club circa 1980; a Marvel Silver Age comics collection.

programme.title: A Chef's Life
programme.desc: A dinner honoring Vivian; the differences between whiskey, scotch and bourbon; how Frank and Jesse James fit into Kentucky's boozy biography.

programme.title: Patience
programme.desc: When a photographer is found dead with a stake through his heart, Patience and DI Frankie Monroe seek a logical answer to the vampire-like mystery.

programme.title: Grantchester on Masterpiece
programme.desc: A drive-in fundraiser turns deadly when a sponsor is found murdered, and multiple suspects confess; as Alphy faces painful truths, Geordie grows jaded, Cathy clashes with Mrs. C and Leonard searches for purpose.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Felicity Montagu and Clare Holman navigate their way around the Midlands and uncover an exceptional lampshade and snooker cue stand; on the way to the auction in Newport, Shropshire, they also discover some fascinating Sikh history.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Muffy's Car Campaign; Truth or Poll
programme.desc: Muffy worries that a petition to help protect the environment may put Crosswire Motors out of business; Brain suggests that Binky conduct a poll about the latest math test.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: Odd Way Round; Strictly Odd Dancing
programme.desc: Orli takes her Odd Squad UK test; Ostin and Olyla tell the others about how they learned to love singing and dancing because of a villain.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Chris and Martin collect porcupine quills to make a necklace for Aviva.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: Benny's toy penguin is swept away by melting snow, transforming a day of sledding into an urgent rescue mission.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla, Luke and Everett look for buried car keys at the beach; Lyla and Everett write a Super Stu comic.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: Twin Sister Hamster Sitters Incorporated; The Sneaker Collection
programme.desc: Nico and Arugula start a hamster sitter business; Carl is afraid to tell his Mama that his new shoes hurt his feet.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Sharing at the Library; Daniel Shares With Margaret
programme.desc: Daniel and O the Owl reach for the same book at the library; Daniel shares his stickers with Margaret.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay use a checklist to guide them through their tasks; Jay creates his first comic book and learns about the importance of page order.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.sub-title: I Wonder If We Can Use This?
programme.desc: Abby, Big Bird and Cookie Monster play against Gabrielle, Zoe and Elmo in I Wonder If We Can Use This, a game where they figure out if items can be used for something.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: Zadie to the Rescue; Cake Mistake
programme.desc: Zadie earns Junior EMT status and follows Ellie on her EMT calls; the Wombats bake a boat-shaped birthday cake.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.sub-title: Trolley Visits Someplace Else; Wish Upon a Fish
programme.desc: Trolley visits Someplace Else for a big party; Donkey thinks her pet fish is magic and will help her complete her tough-stuff-to-do list.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.desc: When Rosie and Javi find out Tia's bringing home a dragon, they anxiously prepare for its arrival; Rosie finds a lucky charm in her backyard, but soon her luck starts to change.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.sub-title: Follow That Roly Poly; Rain, Rain Don't Go Away
programme.desc: The Exploring Club discovers that there is an entire community of critters living under logs; Elinor, Ari and Olive learn how rain is helpful to plants and animals.

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.desc: Alma spends a special day with Papi; Alma gives up her ticket, so Eddie can see his favorite singer in concert.

programme.sub-title: Sticker Shock; A Song for Lola
programme.desc: Tooey's brothers won't stop using Tooey's stuff! To keep track of who owns what, Tooey labels everything he can; Vera's Lola Miranda is coming back to Qyah on a visit from the Philippines! Vera wants to surprise her with a special song!

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.sub-title: I Am Kate Warne; I Am Sir Arthur Conan Doyle

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn visits Washington's Cherry Blossom Festival and plants a tree; Mark learns how Mount Rushmore was built and shows stone cutting; Nathan visits Abe Lincoln's house then replaces mortise hardware.

programme.title: Human Footprint
programme.desc: Tracing the arc of extinction from prehistory to the present, from fossils entombed in tar to cells frozen in hope.

programme.desc: Richard Gere narrates the life of the Buddha.

programme.desc: A fancy yellow diamond ring circa 1950; an 1880 Hughes & Woodward football rule book; a World War I James Montgomery Flagg Uncle Sam poster.

programme.desc: We love to be outside and in this episode the Wade, Jeff and Clark are outdoors having fun hitting golf balls, tossing bean bags, turkey hunting and just goofing off.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: As Bill, captain of the Bounty Hunter, struggles to stay out of the red, Dave gives him false advice that sends him farther away from the fish.

programme.title: The High Road With Keith Warren
programme.sub-title: Smoking Hogs and Bucks in South Texas
programme.desc: In part 1 of this 2-part series, Keith Warren and Johnny Piazza of The High Road head down to a ranch in Texas to do some non-stop shooting on whitetail deer and feral hogs! The guys are using Air Guns, thermal, rifles and more to take out as many...

programme.title: Hard Truths Of Conservation
programme.desc: Black bear conservation requires different approaches across the United States - Dan Cabela explores the reality of what is being done to protect the species in Oklahoma, Arkansas and Maine.

programme.title: Wallhanger Tv
programme.desc: Back in Louisiana, hunting is slow, but the swamps come alive when Ranger Wall tags a wild hog. Plus, never-before-seen footage from last year's Lizard Creek buck gets its spotlight.

programme.title: The Choice
programme.desc: Continuing the legacy, RJ and Aubrey, joined by Ralph and Vicki, chase gorgeous black bears with Trophy West in BC.

programme.title: Red Arrow Tv
programme.sub-title: Momma Tried and Some Deer Died
programme.desc: After drawing first blood on a big 7, Kip's daughter Izzie is taking her crossbow after a west Texas freezer queen, and then it's Mom's turn! Kip's wife, Kat, has a big job taking care of their little band of savages, but she is not just a great mom.
Brady Snyder chases big bucks in his home state of Iowa!
